subject: New Request: Software Engineer – TypeScript – E-commerce
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Byteshop (e-commerce) is looking for a mid Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: 2021-06-21
  • Duration: TBD
  • Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 750 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • TypeScript
  • AWS
  • Kubernetes
  • Redis

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
